title: Mecca, Makkah — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mecca, Makkah: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mecca is a city in Makkah with a population of 2,150,000. The holiest city in Islam, birthplace of the Prophet Muhammad, and destination of the annual Hajj pilgrimage.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
